query: SELECT DISTINCT MONTH(data_referencia) as mes, YEAR(data_referencia) as ano, COUNT(*) as total FROM demonstrativo WHERE estabelecimento_id = 1 GROUP BY MONTH(data_referencia), YEAR(data_referencia) ORDER BY ano DESC, mes DESC
